category_sources: source_facts.description says epinio is a CLI for an Application Development Engine for Kubernetes; official Epinio docs describe it as an Application Development Platform on Kubernetes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is epinio; official docs brand the project as Epinio.
docs_sources: Official Epinio documentation is hosted at docs.epinio.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/epinio/epinio; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Epinio docs describe CLI-driven application deployment on Kubernetes.
